title: Watch of Fireworks
description: Replaces the Firework with a watch.
body:
# Description
**Watch of Fireworks** is inspired by the [Watch of Undying](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/watch-of-undying), a resource pack that transforms the Totem of Undying into a stylish watch. Similarly, the **Watch of Fireworks** gives fireworks a fresh look by turning them into a watch. And it doesn't require optifine or any other mods!
![Before and After: Second person](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/629bba4902b0e194694f213f714d2cefc8cbc58e.png)
![Before and After: First person](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1ec12b70e939df47d10fe97e6043726f15139155.png)
This pack uses the same module created by the original creator of the Watch of Undying, with modifications to the watch's color and design to suit fireworks. I hope you enjoy the design! Don’t forget to check out the amazing [Watch of Undying](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/watch-of-undying) too! <3
